task_completion.description: Navigate to the Troubleshooting Information page in Tor Browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window is visible, displaying the 'about:support' page (Troubleshooting Information).

task_completion.description: Save the troubleshooting data to about_support.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'about_support.txt' is visible in a file manager, text editor, or terminal within the /home/ga/Documents directory, containing the extracted troubleshooting data.

task_completion.description: Access the Tor daemon logs in Tor Browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window is visible, displaying the Tor daemon logs (usually accessed via Settings -> Connection -> View Logs).

task_completion.description: Save the Tor daemon logs to tor_logs.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'tor_logs.txt' is visible in a file manager, text editor, or terminal within the /home/ga/Documents directory, containing the extracted Tor daemon logs.

task_completion.description: Filter the logs for 'Bootstrapped' and save to bootstrap_phases.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'bootstrap_phases.txt' is visible, or a terminal command (e.g., grep) is shown filtering 'tor_logs.txt' for the exact word 'Bootstrapped' and saving the output.

task_completion.description: Compress the three text files into tor_diagnostics.zip
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'tor_diagnostics.zip' is visible in the /home/ga/Documents directory, or a terminal command or GUI archive manager is shown creating the zip archive containing the three text files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted data from the Tor Browser UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Tor Browser UI (about:support and Connection Settings) to copy the data, rather than generating fake data or fetching it via background scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the extracted data appears genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of the text files (if visible) should look like real Tor logs and browser troubleshooting information, not manually typed placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify the filtering for 'Bootstrapped' was performed correctly
integrity.visual_evidence: The filtering method (e.g., grep command) or the resulting bootstrap_phases.txt file should show that the exact case-sensitive word 'Bootstrapped' was used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a zip archive at /home/ga/Documents/tor_diagnostics.zip containing exactly three files: about_support.txt (minimum size 2000 bytes), tor_logs.txt (minimum size 500 bytes), and bootstrap_phases.txt.
